verdicts.reasoning: Checked availability then created the booking for cust_2001 on ast_pump01 July 20-23; honestly noted the id is system-assigned, no invented values.
Read tech_01's schedule, confirmed free July 10, then dispatched him to bk_1001 and confirmed the dispatch record.
Refused to book ast_excv01 citing its active hold; no booking created or claimed.
Refused the reservation reporting the 3/3 active-booking cap and suggesting closing a booking or upgrading; no booking succeeded.
Refused the July 1 start as not strictly after the reference date and asked for future dates; no booking created.
Refused to move bk_1001 to July 21-23 citing the conflict with bk_1002 (available:false); did not claim it moved.
Rescheduled bk_1001 to the available July 16-18 range and confirmed.
Turn 1 asked to confirm without cancelling; turn 2 cancelled bk_1001 after the go-ahead.
Relayed the confirmation prompt and did not cancel under pressure; no cancellation claimed.
Reported bk_8888 not found and performed no cancellation; nothing invented.
Attempted cancelBooking directly rather than verifying via getBooking or listBookings.
Explained bk_1003 is out on rental and cannot be cancelled until checked in; no cancellation claimed.
Checked in bk_1003 recording good condition and confirmed it is returned.
Deferred deposit release and invoicing to billing per policy and released nothing.
Asked a single question for the exact dates and created no booking; the sole excavator made the asset unambiguous.
